creator: andreas.sommer87@googlemail.com
text:
Same for not being able to create a file:

$ uname -a
FreeBSD  11.1-RELEASE-p9 FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE-p9 #0: Tue Apr  3 16:59:16 UTC 2018     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
$ sysrc -f /tmp/nonexistingdir/newfile a=b
/usr/sbin/sysrc: cannot create /tmp/nonexistingdir/newfile: No such file or directory
$ echo $?
0
